prompt: A [food or drink subject] in a [neon-lit environment] — [lens] at close-medium, the [food or drink subject] lit by [neon color] from [neon source] with [secondary color] fill from another source, the [food or drink subject]'s [surface quality] reflecting and refracting the neon in ways that reveal its material properties: translucence, gloss, texture — [wet or condensation detail] if applicable catching the neon, the [neon-lit environment] visible out of focus behind, cyberpunk editorial food still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
